title: Parker Scheduled to Present at the Morgan Stanley Annual Laguna Conference on September 13 at 9:55 a.m. Pacific Time (12:55 p.m.
text: CLEVELAND, Sept. 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today announced that it is scheduled to present at the Morgan Stanley Annual Laguna Conference in Dana Point, California on September 13, 2023 at 9:55 a.m. Pacific time (12:55 p.m. Eastern time).

title: Parker Elects Denise Russell Fleming to its Board of Directors
text: CLEVELAND, Sept. 05, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today announced the election of Denise Russell Fleming to its Board of Directors, effective September 1, 2023.
